title: The Adventures Of Captain Underpants
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: George & Harold hypnotize Principal Krupp into Captain Underpants!

title: Captain Underpants and the Attack of the Talking Toilets
titleZh: 内裤队长与会说话的马桶来袭
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: George & Harold's comic about talking toilets comes to life!

title: Captain Underpants and the Invasion of the Incredibly Naughty Cafeteria Ladies from Outer Space
titleZh: 内裤队长与来自外太空的调皮食堂大妈入侵
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Evil aliens pose as lunch ladies and turn the school into zombie nerds!

title: Captain Underpants and the Perilous Plot of Professor Poopypants
titleZh: 内裤队长与 poopypants 教授的惊天阴谋
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: A mad scientist forces the whole world to rename itself!

title: Captain Underpants and the Wrath of the Wicked Wedgie Women
titleZh: 内裤队长与邪恶的Wedgie女侠之怒
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: A wicked Wedgie Woman terrorizes the school!

title: Captain Underpants And The Big Bad Battle Of The Bionic Booger Boy Part 1 - The Night Of The Nasty Nostril Nuggets
titleZh: 内裤队长与机械鼻涕怪人大战（上）：恶心鼻屎之夜
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Melvin turns into a Bionic Booger Boy!

title: Captain Underpants And The Big, Bad Battle Of The Bionic Booger Boy Part 2 - The Revenge Of The Ridiculous Robo Boogers
titleZh: 内裤队长与机械鼻涕怪人大战（下）：可笑机器人鼻涕怪的复仇
author: Dav Pilkey

title: Captain Underpants and the Preposterous Plight of the Purple Potty People
titleZh: 内裤队长与紫色马桶人的离奇困境
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: George and Harold meet their evil twins in a backwards dimension!

title: Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Return of Tippy Tinkletrousers
titleZh: 内裤队长与蒂皮·叮当裤的恐怖回归
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Tippy Tinkletrousers returns in a giant Robo-Suit for revenge!

title: Captain Underpants and the Revolting Revenge of the Radioactive Robo-Boxers
titleZh: 内裤队长与放射性机器人拳击手的复仇
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Tippy's time tricks unleash Robo-Boxers and rewrite dinosaur history!

title: Captain Underpants and the Tyrannical Retaliation of the Turbo Toilet 2000
titleZh: 内裤队长与涡轮马桶2000的暴君式报复
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: The giant Turbo Toilet 2000 returns from Uranus for revenge!

title: Captain Underpants and the Sensational Saga of Sir Stinks-A-Lot
titleZh: 内裤队长与臭屁爵士的轰动传奇
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Mr. Meaner's mind-control spray turns kids into obedient zombies!
